name: Kai
note: Last Sword Protocol protagonist placeholder wiring.
profile: A quiet, stubborn Ashford teen haunted by dreams of a blue-lit sword.

name: Vera
note: Party member 2. Joins after Iron Foreman boss (Map 22 EV5). Ranged tech fighter. Sprite/face are placeholders — replace with custom VERA assets.
profile:
A coal-dusted mechanic from Coalmo
uth who spent a decade keeping old
-world machines running. Two wrenc
hes, one pneumatic bolt-driver, an
d zero patience for anything she c
an't fix.

name: Eldon
note: Party member 3. Joins at The Athenaeum (Town 2). Magic/support role. Sprite/face are placeholders — replace with custom ELDON assets.
profile:
An elderly scholar who has spent h
is life cataloguing the ruins of t
he old world. He knows things no o
ne alive should know — because he 
made sure someone would.

name: Cipher
note: Party member 4. Joins late Act II / The Drift (Town 4). Debuff/analysis. Secretly a fragment of the Ancestor's AI assistant. Sprite/face are placeholders.
profile:
A hooded figure encountered mid-jo
urney. Not quite human. Not quite 
machine. Carries a portable device
 that hums at odd intervals and se
ems to know things before they hap
pen.
